title: The BEST AI for 4K images. Free & fast
summary: PiD Pixel Diffusion by Nvidia is an open-source AI image model designed for high-resolution 4K image generation. The video demonstrates its use within ComfyUI workflows and compares it against alternatives like SeedVR2, covering installation, upscaling, and text-to-image capabilities.
